summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Electrogrupo website - both backend API and frontend functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Minor overlay interception issue when clicking accordion items in mobile menu

design_issues.issue: Using placeholder images (picsum.photos) instead of actual Cloudinary images in hero and technical sections

passed_tests: Backend health check API responds correctly at /api/health
Homepage loads with all required sections (hero carousel, brands, mission, solutions, news, CTA, footer)
Navigation bar renders with all menu items (Inicio, Empresa, Irrigación, Pos Cosecha, Contacto, Soporte)
About Us page loads correctly at /sobre-nosotros with hero, history, mission & vision sections
Projects page loads correctly at /proyectos with main article and related articles sidebar
Pivot Irrigation page loads correctly at /riego-por-pivot with hero, features, technical details, and CTA
Navigation links work correctly between pages
Cotizar button present in header (links to external tally.so form)
